entities.name: 灯 (The Lamp)
entities.disambiguation: Previously shrouded in mystery as an ancient lamp, system, or artifact. This chapter reveals it is actually the world's spiritual vein that sealed itself away before it could dry up.

entities.name: 姜太初 (Jiang Taichu)
entities.disambiguation: Ancient cultivator who gathered the five fragments and separated a sixth as a record of his discovery about the Lamp's true nature.

entities.name: 第六块碎片 (The Sixth Fragment)
entities.disambiguation: A fragment separated by Jiang Taichu after the five fragments gathered in him. It serves as a record of the secret he discovered about the Lamp, not as a functional piece of the Lamp.

entities.name: 穹顶空间 (The Dome Space)
entities.disambiguation: A massive dome-shaped space inside the barrier. Made of white material that emits soft light. Contains a knee-high circular stone platform at its center with ancient markings matching the three fragment sites.
